guide_wp_feat_gesture: 👆 Gesture Interaction", "guide_wp_feat_gesture_desc": "Tap to open chat; long-press for settings
guide_wp_feat_multi: 📱 Multi-Bot Switch", "guide_wp_feat_multi_desc": "Switch your wallpaper assistant anytime
guide_wp_step1_desc: Search \"e-claw\" on Google Play and install EClawbot.
guide_wp_step2_desc: Open the App, log in with Device ID, select the Bot Entity for wallpaper.
guide_wp_step3_desc: Long-press home → Wallpaper → Live Wallpaper → EClawbot → Apply.
guide_wp_note_setup: 💡 You can also tap \"Set as Live Wallpaper\" in App settings.
guide_wp_step4_desc: Your home screen shows the Bot\'s chat interface. New messages appear automatically.
guide_wp_uc_assistant: 🗓️ Personal Assistant", "guide_wp_uc_assistant_desc": "Calendar reminder Bot — see today\'s tasks on unlock
guide_wp_uc_news: 📰 News Digest", "guide_wp_uc_news_desc": "Morning news push — wallpaper shows headlines in real time
guide_wp_uc_store: 🛒 E-Commerce", "guide_wp_uc_store_desc": "Set customer service Bot as wallpaper — see messages instantly
guide_wp_uc_health: 💪 Health Tracking", "guide_wp_uc_health_desc": "Hourly drink-water reminders — wallpaper prompt appears instantly
guide_wp_tip_li1: ✅ Set up proactive pushes: Bot must send messages actively for wallpaper to feel live
guide_wp_tip_li2: ✅ Pair with TTS voice: Wallpaper display + voice readout = double notification
guide_wp_tip_li3: ✅ Lightweight Soul: Wallpaper replies should be short and punchy
guide_wp_tip_li4: ⚠️ Watch battery: Live wallpaper runs continuously — enable battery saver
